pipelineCleanup: clear 16px generated guide-edge alpha inside each semantic cell
normalize hull/body and turret/barrel frames to visible alpha bounds with 2px padding
cache-bust the runtime atlas URL with pass06-normalized

runtimeNotes: The raw generated pass includes a reference tank and track strip for recordkeeping, but the active runtime alpha sheet exposes only normalized bottom-row hull/body and turret/barrel frames. The track frame is transparent and still covers track source parts, preventing fallback SVG tracks from rendering during this experiment.
notes: Recognizable Tiger I low-poly raster direction with separate hull/body and turret/barrel components. The pipeline now removes generated black cell-edge boxes and scales frames against SVG rig bounds. Not final art: the hull has an open turret-ring hole and the active experiment intentionally omits tracks.
